checkin.journal:
Woke up at 4:30 am could not sleep slept only 4 hours my head hurt a bit, but after meditation and the multivitamin pill I was much better vitamin pills really  help a lot. 

after talking to Alex feeling even more calm, he was melting away my public speaking anxiety
But too much awake in evening - probably the fact are the vitamins in the multivitamin pills

the patch that ma guy gave me was really hot at night and it was bugging me, I think I will maybe wear it during the day
Hurts a bit here
